summary: Monthly/yearly subscriber live National TV Game in market - Feed Select modal
description:
GIVEN the user is a monthly/yearly subscriber
AND there is a National TV Game scheduled/in-progress in the viewing market of the user
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals true in MASTepg
AND the game level entitledVideo equals true in MASTepg

**NOTE:**
National TV game = FOX Saturday Baseball or ESPN Sunday Night Baseball

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the National TV game tile with a Blackout pill
steps.result:
THEN video feed buttons are not displayed
AND a title displays with text "_Stream On: <Partner Service>_"
AND the following blackout messaging is displayed in the Feed Select modal: "_This broadcast is available to watch exclusively on <Broadcast Partner Name>. Please download from your device app store to watch now or visit [link tbd] to learn more. Archives will be available 90 minutes after the end of the game._"
